songs.title: Sirad Ashimya's Overture
songs.prompt: Short overture for an adventurer. Instrumental, concise, with a memorable leitmotif. Character: Sirad Ashimya. Identity: Infernis, Seraph, Divine Wielder, from the Slyborne community. Experiences: Lost Everything And Still Kept Losing; Darkness Encroaching. Story: I pray to the trickster god, and after I availed my body to Him he left nothing behind after he was done. I shall slay my god — it is all me. My physique filled out and my hair got a fantastic sheen to it I punch Him in the face. Motifs: Bare Bones, Bolt Beacon. Symbols: Greatsword, Gambeson Armor.

songs.title: Sirad Ashimya's Overture
